title: RiderWatchCraft
description: An addon for KamenRiderWeaponCraft that adds an external Core/Watch system, allowing you to install/uninstall Rider cores and unleash unique abilities!
body:
Extended Description
Rider Watch Craft is an addon for KamenRiderWeaponCraft (by xiaoshi2022) that adds an external Core system to the Heisei Sword.

What does this mod do?
This mod allows you to collect special Rider Cores and attach them to your Heisei Sword. Once attached, the sword gains new abilities based on the equipped core.

How it works
Obtain a Core – Craft or acquire a Rider Core item (e.g., Kuuga Mighty Core)

Install the Core – Hold the core in your off-hand and press the designated key (default: R)

Use the Ability – Right-click while holding the Heisei Sword to unleash the core's unique skill

Remove the Core – Press the same key (default: R) with an empty off-hand to detach it

Current Cores
Core	Ability	Damage	Energy Cost
Kuuga Mighty Core	Rider Kick – Launches a fireball entity that explodes on impact	45	20
ZZZ Dream Core	Dream Power – Creates a cloud of soul particles around the player	48	25
Controls
Action	Default Key
Install / Detach Core	R (customizable in Controls menu)
Activate Core Skill	Right-click (while holding Heisei Sword)
Compatibility
Requires: KamenRiderWeaponCraft, GeckoLib

Minecraft Version: 1.21.1

Mod Loader: NeoForge

Conflict: None known – original mod features remain fully functional

Why this addon?
KamenRiderWeaponCraft includes a Core system for internal Rider forms, but this addon extends it by allowing external cores that can be attached and removed at any time, similar to how Ridewatches work in the Kamen Rider series.

Technical Notes
This mod uses:

Mixin to override HeiseiswordModel rendering for custom models

Custom network packets for client-server communication

GeckoLib for item animations

NeoForge's key binding system for customizable controls

Source Code
This mod is open source under the MIT License. You are free to use, modify, and distribute it as long as you include the original license.

This description accurately reflects the mod's functionality and does not make any false or misleading claims. The mod does not contain any malicious code, backdoors, or unauthorized data collection.
